topTargets.name: Emmett Johnson
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #8 (DoT 84.6) with a Waldman trajectory comp to Harold Fannin — exactly the type of underrated talent a high-RSP-affinity owner reaches for at 1.15 when consensus names are gone. ADP slips him outside the top 30, so he is realistically available and gives WABS a fresh RB to refresh a 6-deep but aging room.

topTargets.name: Eli Stowers
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #11 (DoT 84.4), classic move TE on the cusp of Starter tier — Waldman loyalists love this archetype, and ADP 21.25 makes him plausible at 1.15. WABS already runs 4 TEs so this is purely a 'best RSP grade left on the board' dart, which is exactly how high-affinity owners draft.

topTargets.name: Demond Claiborne
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #9 (DoT 84.5) with a Shady McCoy comp and Waldman explicitly calling him a second-rounder regardless of weight concern — premium RSP value if he slips to 1.15. WABS' RB room is quantity over quality, so a high-ceiling lead-back profile justifies the pick.

topTargets.name: Myles Montgomery
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #13 and explicitly tagged 'MOST UNDERRATED skill talent in the 2026 class' — a religious Waldman reader cannot pass this at 3.02 even with likely UDFA status. With $4.3M cap and zero taxi used, WABS can stash him essentially free at 50% rookie minimum.

topTargets.name: Bryce Lance
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #22 with an A.J. Green high-end comp and 'must-draft' flag from Waldman in deeper formats — perfect 3.04 RSP-affinity flier. WABS is 7-deep at WR but high-affinity owners chase Waldman's must-draft tags regardless of room.

capPosture: Workable: $4.3M space against $45M cap with zero taxi spots used — can comfortably absorb a 1st-round rookie on the active roster and stash both 3rds on taxi at 50% base salary.

wildcard.name: Robert Henry Jr.
wildcard.reasoning: RSP #24 (DoT 83.4) with Achane/Aaron Jones/James Cook comp from Waldman and not even on MFL ADP top 30 — pure RSP-affinity special at 3.04 that consensus owners would never touch.

summary: WABS is a high-RSP-affinity owner picking 1.15 with $4.3M cap room and an empty taxi — primed to chase Waldman's underrated names rather than consensus ADP. Expect a Waldman-favorite RB or move-TE in round 1 (Johnson/Stowers/Claiborne over the obvious WR-only fits) followed by deep-RSP fliers in round 3 (Montgomery, Lance, Henry Jr.) stashed on taxi at half salary.
